title: AnimalSubmission
description: All-species adoptable-animal submission record for the WaitingTheLongest Intake API. SOURCE OF TRUTH is components.schemas.AnimalSubmission/AnimalCore in openapi.yaml; this standalone file is a derived artifact for validators, CSV checking, SDK generation, and the conformance suite, and MUST be regenerated whenever the spec changes. It is self-contained and uses additionalProperties:false for maximum validator compatibility. Controlled-vocabulary values and their verification status are documented in SAC_VOCABULARY_MAPPING.md.

external_id.description: The organization's stable identifier and the upsert key.

species_detail.description: Free-text variety or morph. Required when species is 'other'.

intake_date.description: Authoritative date the animal entered the organization's care. Server rejects future dates and dates before 1990-01-01. Drives the core ranking metric.

intake_type.description: SAC IOD live-intake category. First four values confirmed against SAC's published matrix; the rest follow the standard framework and must be confirmed before v1.0.

size.description: Primarily meaningful for dogs and cats; optional for other species.

primary_breed.description: Normalized server-side against a controlled list; unmapped values are flagged for review, never silently dropped.

estimated_birthdate.description: Provide this OR age_months. If both are given they must agree within 60 days (server rule).

weight_kg.description: Kilograms. Unit-explicit to remove lb/kg ambiguity.

adoption_fee.description: In adoption_fee_currency. Omit when unknown rather than guessing 0.

photo_upload_ids.description: IDs returned by the photo-upload endpoint. Preferred over raw URLs.

photo_urls.description: Externally hosted image URLs; validated and re-hosted server-side.

listing_url.description: The organization's own adoption page for this animal.

status.description: WaitingTheLongest operational listing status. Not a SAC field.

location.description: Where the animal can be met. Falls back to the organization's location if omitted.

trit.description: Three-valued behavioral flag. 'unknown' is explicit and never inferred from absence.
